input_json.clause_text: The minimum side setback for a dwelling shall be 1.0 metre from each side boundary.

expected_json.detail: Candidate quote 'minimum setback shall be 1.0 metre' does not appear verbatim in the clause text. Extraction rejected — quote must be an exact substring of the source clause.
expected_json.required_verbatim_quote_example: minimum side setback for a dwelling shall be 1.0 metre from each side boundary

metadata_json.name: Quote anchoring — non-verbatim quote rejected
metadata_json.notes: Validates that rule extraction rejects any candidate whose 'quote' field is not an exact verbatim substring of the source clause text. This is the quote-anchoring invariant from MASTER_REBUILD_PLAN.md §8.1: 'every candidate has quote + clause + source version; invalid quotes rejected'. Illustrative clause text only — real R-Codes text must not be stored here. source_version_id must be replaced with the UUID of the approved WA R-Codes source version at Stage 3.
metadata_json.outcome_if_passing: validation rejects non-verbatim quote; skill must only accept exact substrings
